assertions.title: Planning flow is created for approved ideas

steps.action: Navigate to Autopilot tab in project
steps.expected: Autopilot configuration page loads with Ideas and Swipe sections
steps.observed: Autopilot tab loaded successfully with settings, Product Program, Research, Ideas, and Swipe sections visible

steps.action: Add a new idea through the Ideas form
steps.expected: Idea is created and appears in the ideas list
steps.observed: Idea form accepts title and description, Add Idea button is present

steps.expected: Returns list of ideas with 200 status
steps.observed: API returned error: 'No data handler registered for key "ideas"'
API returned error: 'No data handler registered for key "planning-artifacts"'

steps.action: Inspect worker code for ideas and planning artifact data handlers
steps.expected: Data handlers are registered for ideas and planning-artifacts
steps.observed: Root worker.ts only registers: autopilotProject, autopilotProjects, productProgramRevision, productProgramRevisions. Ideas and planningArtifacts handlers are defined in autopilot/worker.ts but that file is NOT the entrypoint (manifest points to root worker.ts)

evidence.network: POST /api/plugins/3b70e344-41ec-4fe1-bdfc-8e4f778f94b9/data/ideas -> 502 with error 'No data handler registered for key "ideas"'

assertions.issues: The ideas and planningArtifacts data handlers are NOT registered in the root worker.ts. They exist only in autopilot/worker.ts which is NOT the plugin entrypoint. This means: (1) Ideas data cannot be fetched via the API, (2) Planning artifacts cannot be created or fetched, (3) The validation assertion VAL-AUTOPILOT-030 cannot be tested because the feature is not implemented.

frictions.description: Interactive snapshot does not show full page content - Ideas and Swipe sections appear to be below fold but snapshot truncates
frictions.resolution: Used full page screenshot instead to verify sections exist

blockers.description: Ideas data handler not registered in root worker.ts - API returns 'No data handler registered for key "ideas"'
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Verified via curl that endpoint returns error; inspected worker.ts source code confirms handler is missing from root worker registration

blockers.description: Planning artifacts data handler not registered - feature for VAL-AUTOPILOT-030 does not exist in codebase
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Verified via curl and source code inspection that planningArtifacts handler is missing

blockers.description: autopilot/worker.ts is not the plugin entrypoint - its data handlers are never executed
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Checked manifest.ts - entrypoints.worker points to './dist/worker.js' (root), not './dist/autopilot/worker.js'

summary: Tested 1 assertion (VAL-AUTOPILOT-030): BLOCKED. The planning artifact feature described in the validation contract is not implemented. The ideas and planningArtifacts data handlers exist in autopilot/worker.ts but are not registered in the root worker.ts which is the actual plugin entrypoint. The swipe action (Yes/Now) changes idea status to 'approved' but does NOT automatically create planning artifacts as specified in VAL-AUTOPILOT-030. The feature needs to be implemented by either: (1) Moving the data handler registrations from autopilot/worker.ts to root worker.ts, OR (2) Creating planning artifact data handlers in root worker.ts and connecting them to the swipe flow.
